meta.name: Esteban Alfaro
meta.theme: Specialization, Strategic Advisory, and Scalable Innovation
meta.northStar: Deliver high-impact, low-volume work through tools, advisory support, and reusable knowledge assets

intro.overview: This 2026 development plan is built to consolidate my position as a Senior Business Presentation Designer while adapting to a 60% part-time schedule. The focus is on high-leverage work: building scalable tools and documentation, shifting from production-heavy support to strategic advisory, and creating systems that keep delivering value even when I am offline.

timeline.q1: Define what sustainable 60% output looks like with leadership, scope the next two VGTools mini-apps, enroll in advanced data visualization training, and set up a living Miro board for impact documentation with the strongest 2025 cases.
timeline.midYear: Use the calibration check-in to confirm workload sustainability, review whether secondary goals need trimming, validate that a new VGTools prototype exists, and convert recurring Affinity guidance into a documented learning asset.
timeline.q3: Act as a regular attendee on primary client study calls, practice proactive capacity blocking, launch new VGTools updates, and roll out a formal Affinity or design training module with a recorded launch session.
timeline.q4: Apply Blender-based 3D work to at least one flagship client presentation and use the impact documentation board to assemble a rich, example-driven self-evaluation with visuals and collected feedback.

mainGoals.title: Master Advanced Data Visualization and Expand VGTools
mainGoals.objective: Become the go-to expert for complex data storytelling and release high-value productivity mini-apps that help the team repeatedly, not just once.

actionItems.text: Define the next two VGTools mini-app opportunities and document the team problems they solve
Enroll in an advanced data visualization course focused on editorial and journalistic storytelling
Develop a working prototype for one new VGTools mini-app
Release VGTools updates or mini-apps to the team with clear usage guidance
Build a reference set of advanced chart examples to strengthen complex data storytelling work

secondaryGoals.title: Shift to Strategic Partner Communication
secondaryGoals.objective: Become a higher-value advisory partner by joining the right conversations early, estimating effort transparently, and protecting capacity through proactive scope management.

actionItems.text: Align with the Team Leader on what sustainable 60% output should look like for an SBPD
Define and test a communication protocol for effort estimation, status updates, and green-light approvals
Join problem-solving or CST calls for one to two key studies to better understand project spirit and reduce rework
Practice proactive blocking when requests exceed part-time capacity

secondaryGoals.title: Formalize Knowledge Sharing and Mentorship
secondaryGoals.objective: Turn ad-hoc mentoring into reusable learning assets that scale my expertise across the team even when I am offline.

actionItems.text: Convert recurring Affinity Squad and Buddy System guidance into a documented guide or learning path
Build a self-service training module for Affinity or VGTools that can plug into the LMS grid
Host one Launch and Learn session and direct future requests to the recording and documentation

secondaryGoals.title: Operationalize Impact Documentation
secondaryGoals.objective: Maintain a live, sanitized record of high-impact work so review preparation becomes a lightweight synthesis instead of a scramble.

actionItems.text: Create a dedicated Miro board for impact documentation
Upload the strongest 2025 cases and begin adding new 2026 success stories immediately after delivery
Prepare a draft impact summary for the April or May calibration check-in
Use the Miro board to assemble a rich self-evaluation with examples, visuals, and feedback quotes

secondaryGoals.title: Blender 3D Integration
secondaryGoals.objective: Develop Blender as a distinctive capability for immersive backgrounds and 3D visual assets that elevate presentation work.

actionItems.text: Complete one structured Blender course such as Blender Guru
Produce three reusable 3D assets or environments for future client work
Use Blender-driven 3D work in one high-profile year-end client presentation

secondaryGoals.title: Continuous Feedback Loop
secondaryGoals.objective: Collect timely project-level feedback so performance signals stay current and tied to the work that matters most.

actionItems.text: Request FeedbackNow input immediately after each high-stakes project closes
Track recurring themes from feedback and feed them into the impact documentation board

notes:
Summary of adjustments for the 60% schedule:

1. Asynchronous mentorship over repeated live coaching. The intent is to build guides, recordings, and self-service materials that continue helping the team without requiring my real-time availability.

2. Tool-based impact over volume-based output. The strongest return comes from VGTools and other mini-apps that compound value while I am offline.

3. Strategic communication as a protective operating model. Clear effort estimates, explicit green lights, and proactive blocking are essential to prevent last-minute requests from spilling into non-working days.

4. Focus weeks and service weeks should remain visible in planning so learning, tool building, and client support do not compete every single week.

Mid-cycle checkpoint questions:
- Is the 60% schedule sustainable without overtime?
- Is there already a working VGTools prototype?
- Have I turned Affinity guidance into a reusable resource?
- Do secondary goals need scope reduction?
